channel.title: MSFT — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on MSFT (Microsoft) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: ADDED MSFT (+22%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) added MSFT in Q4 2025 · 4.8% of portfolio. Tiger-style quality compounder add.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Andreas Halvorsen)

item.title: Polen Capital: TRIMMED MSFT (-22%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Polen Capital (Polen Capital Management) trimmed MSFT in Q4 2025 · 8.1% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Polen Capital)

item.title: Chase Coleman: TRIMMED MSFT (-16%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) trimmed MSFT in Q4 2025 · 8.9% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Chase Coleman)

item.title: Lee Ainslie: TRIMMED MSFT (-16%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Lee Ainslie (Maverick Capital) trimmed MSFT in Q4 2025 · 6.1% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Lee Ainslie)

item.title: John Armitage: ADDED MSFT (+12%) · Q4 2025
item.description: John Armitage (Egerton Capital) added MSFT in Q4 2025 · 8.9% of portfolio. Quality compounder add.
